description: Welcome to Janta Piles Clinic Leading Doctors Diagnostic Center Your Trusted Partner in Proctology Care Discover More Your Trusted Partner in Proctology Care Advanced Laser Treatment Experience a quicker, less painful recovery with our state-of-the-art laser procedures. This minimally invasive technique ensures precision and reduces post-treatment discomfort, so you can get back to your life faster. Explore Our Treatments Expert Medical Team Our clinics are staffed by experienced proctologists who specialize exclusively in treating piles and related conditions. You can trust that you are in the hands of dedicated experts focused on your specific needs. Explore Our Treatments Convenience of 29 Branches With 29 clinics across the region, high-quality care is never far away. Find a Janta Piles Clinic near you and schedule an appointment at your convenience without the stress of long-distance travel. Explore Our Treatments Don’t Let Piles Control Your Life Any Longer Take the first step towards a pain-free future today. Our friendly team is ready to answer your questions and help you schedule a confidential consultation with one of our specialists. Our friendly team is ready to answer your questions and help you schedule a confidential consultation. Dedicated to Your Well-Being Contact Us Comprehensive Care for Every Patient At Janta Piles Clinic, we are committed to providing advanced, compassionate, and effective treatment for piles, fissures, and fistulas. With a team of expert proctologists and cutting-edge laser technology, we ensure a pain-free recovery and a healthier tomorrow. Get Best Treatment Experience advanced care for lasting relief. Our Doctors 0 + Medical Procedures 0 k+ Happy Patients 0 % Winning Awards 0 + Are You Looking for a Special Treatment? Dealing with conditions like piles, fissures, or fistulas can be uncomfortable, painful, and often isolating. Many people delay seeking help due to embarrassment or fear of painful, outdated procedures. If you’re searching for a treatment that is not just effective but also compassionate and tailored specifically to you, you have come to the right place. At Janta Piles Clinic, we believe that “special treatment” isn’t a luxury—it’s the standard of care every patient deserves. Advanced Diagnostics Our Advanced Diagnostics service utilizes cutting-edge technology for precise assessments. We identify the root cause of your condition with unparalleled accuracy. Pain Management Therapy Our Pain Management Therapy is designed to minimize your discomfort at every stage. We combine advanced techniques with compassionate care to ease your pain. Testing & Counseling Our comprehensive testing ensures we understand your specific condition completely. Personalized counseling helps you feel informed and comfortable with your treatment path. Reproductive Treatments Our Reproductive Treatments offer advanced solutions for your health needs. We provide expert and compassionate care in a confidential setting. Caring for You Precision Care Human Connection Your Wellness, Our Mission Empowering Health Enhancing Lives Book Your Confidential Consultation Now Don’t let pain control another day of your life. Take the first step towards lasting relief with Janta Piles Clinic. Our expert doctors use advanced, minimally invasive treatments to ensure your comfort and a quick recovery. With 29 convenient locations, compassionate care is never far away. Work Hours Monday-Wednesday 10:00 AM – 05:00 PM Thursday-Friday 10:00 AM – 05:00 PM Saturday 10:00 AM – 05:00 PM Sunday 10:00 AM – 05:00 PM Your Path to a Pain-FreeLife Starts Here Living with the constant discomfort and pain of piles, fissures, or fistulas is not something you have to accept. A better, healthier future is within your reach, and it starts with seeking the right kind of care—a special treatment designed for you. Sonia Gupta Sony CEO      I cannot speak highly enough of my experience at Janta Piles Clinic. After suffering in silence for years, I finally decided to seek treatment, and choosing this clinic was the best decision I could have made. The advanced laser treatment they offered was a game-changer. It was minimally invasive, virtually painless, and the recovery was incredibly fast. I was back to my normal routine in just a couple of days, which I never thought possible. Ankit Advocate      Finding specialized medical care that is also convenient can be a real challenge, but Janta Piles Clinic made it incredibly easy. With 29 branches, I was able to find a clinic just a short drive from my home, which took away so much of the stress associated with appointments. Scheduling was a breeze, and the staff were extremely accommodating and worked around my busy schedule. Sameer Nisha Singh      My experience with Janta Piles Clinic was nothing short of exceptional, particularly with their pain management therapy. Before coming here, the constant pain was affecting every part of my day, making simple activities feel like monumental tasks. The team at Janta Piles Clinic approached my situation with such kindness and empathy, making me feel heard and understood from the very first appointment. They didn’t just see a patient; they saw a person in need of relief.
